user_query: I'm a pet lover and looking for a new furry friend. Can you help me find trending images of cute puppies and kittens? Also, provide images of different dog breeds and cat breeds. Additionally, I would like to know the supported languages and countries for pet adoption inspiration.

TaskList.description: Find and fetch trending images of cute puppies.
Find and fetch trending images of cute kittens.
Fetch images of different dog breeds.
Fetch images of different cat breeds.
Get information on supported languages and countries for pet adoption inspiration.
